decisions.title: Approve Ingest MCP PRD Scope for Sift Edge
decisions.context: ENG-10697 requires scoping Model Context Protocol integration for ingestion. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar—enables seamless external tool connectivity. Affects Q2 Sift Edge roadmap.

arguments.for: Unlocks third-party data sources; differentiates Sift Edge; aligns with 'Build the Moat' strategy
arguments.against: Diverts resources from core GUI stability (ENG-10561, ENG-10376); adds complexity to already-loaded Q2 sprint

decisions.title: Prioritize Conversation UX (File Uploads, Archives, Followups) vs. Core Stability
decisions.context: ENG-10392 (file uploads), ENG-10624 (archive chats), ENG-10703 (suggested followups) enhance Ask SIFT conversational experience. But ENG-10358 (search bug), ENG-10561 (connection logic) indicate instability. North Star = Decisions Captured—requires trust.
decisions.blockedBy: Need data on conversation abandonment rate due to bugs vs. feature gaps

arguments.for: File uploads + followups directly increase decisions captured per session; competitive table stakes
arguments.against: Bugs erode trust faster than features add value; 'Nail the Core' means stability first

decisions.title: Commit to Starpath Co-Branded Story (CAGR-37)
decisions.context: Starpath MSA + co-branded case study. Joint marketing aligns with 'Embed Deeper'—showcasing customer success drives decisions captured industry-wide. Requires legal + eng review.

arguments.for: Proof point for aerospace vertical; amplifies LA Times/HAUS media momentum (CAGR-25, CAGR-26); signals validation
arguments.against: Legal + NDA risk; diverts content resources from product launches (Explore V2, Canvas)

decisions.title: Sunset Legacy Ingest Config Flows Table (ENG-9616)
decisions.context: Removing ArbPB dependency on 'ingest_config_flows' table. Technical debt blocking Python Rules scalability. Affects 'Nail the Core' + 'Build the Moat'.

arguments.for: Reduces query latency by 30%; enables Python Rules to scale to 10k+ customers; clears Q3 backend roadmap
arguments.against: Risk of breaking existing ingestion pipelines for legacy customers; requires coordination with CSMs

decisions.title: Approve Feature Flag Migration to File-Based System (ENG-10662)
decisions.context: Migrating from DB-based to file-based feature flags. Improves deployment speed, reduces DB load. Affects all product releases (Explore V2, Canvas, Sift Edge).

arguments.for: Faster rollouts; GitOps alignment; reduces production DB dependencies; supports rapid experimentation
arguments.against: Requires DevOps retooling; potential rollback complexity; learning curve for PMs managing flags

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting load (80% utilization) risks decision latency. 3 critical decisions require deep work—recommend blocking Friday AM for strategic review. Edge GUI work (5 tickets) + Ask SIFT UX (3 tickets) suggest parallelization risk.
alerts: Decision backlog: 5 open decisions, 1 blocked—recommend decision sprint Thursday
Engineering fragmentation: 30 active Linear tickets across 4 products—consider consolidation
Marketing coordination overhead: CAGR-25, CAGR-26, CAGR-37 require sync—schedule single alignment meeting
P0 bug count rising: ENG-10358 (search bug) + ENG-9799 (bulk load lag) impact user trust—escalate to daily standup

events.title: Decision: Conversation UX vs. Stability Priority
events.description: Resolve ENG-10392/10624/10703 sequencing. Requires abandonment data from analytics.
